component: Stage 1 observation and normalized PD action
impact_on_current_bad_videos: This part is unlikely to be the source of the generic leaning-pose failure if official obs order and exported normalizer are preserved.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Keep using official observation order/export metadata. Do not hand-build a 160-D MuJoCo obs without metadata validation.

paper_contract: Non-anchor desired body pose is yaw-aligned, height-preserving, and translated under current anchor.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: A broken anchor transform would cause drifting/jumping references; official code implements the paper transform.
required_fix_before_success_claim: For MuJoCo replay/video, use the same anchor convention or label as diagnostic only.

paper_contract: Gaussian body pos/orientation/linear velocity/angular velocity rewards with std 0.3/0.4/1.0/3.14 plus action-rate, joint-limit, contact penalties.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: Weak teacher reward is more likely undertraining/data/asset/runtime quality than a different reward formula.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Use official rewards for next teacher; compare reward components and termination counts per checkpoint before downstream VAE.

paper_contract: Terminate when anchor or EE z-position error >0.25 m, or anchor orientation error >0.8 rad.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: High termination counts explain bad teacher rollouts and VAE collapse. The public code checks projected gravity for anchor orientation, not a full log-map norm.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Gate teacher checkpoints by done rate/episode length/motion-time continuity before collecting VAE data.
notes: Public code detail should be reported instead of silently treated as exact supplementary-text implementation.

component: Stage 1 PD, action scale, and armature
paper_contract: kp=I*w^2, kd=2*I*zeta*w, w=10 Hz, zeta=2, alpha=0.25*tau_max/kp; dual ankles/waist use doubled armature.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: If MuJoCo PD uses different kp/kd/action scale/joint order, learned actions can look like leaning or tiny steps even with a good policy.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Before final MuJoCo videos, export or derive exact joint order, kp, kd, armature, default pose, and action scale from official metadata/checkpoint.

paper_contract: Friction/restitution, default joint offsets, torso COM, and velocity perturbations; text mentions larger ankle offset.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: This is not the main reason the current videos are generic, but it matters for final paper-contract training.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Decide explicitly whether to follow public code exactly or patch ankle default offsets to the supplementary text, then document the choice.

paper_contract: Failure-rate bins, EMA alpha=0.001, uniform floor 0.1/S, non-causal kernel rho=0.8 over u={0,1,2}, reset to reference state with perturbations.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: Poor sampling can slow learning of hard segments such as leg lift/single-leg balance.
required_fix_before_success_claim: For hard single-leg training, either patch kernel size to 3 per paper or record that public code uses kernel size 1.

paper_contract: Actor/critic [512,256,128], ELU, 24 steps/env, 30000 iterations, lr 1e-3, clip 0.2, entropy 0.005, gamma 0.99, GAE 0.95, desired KL 0.01.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: Earlier short/low-memory candidates are not enough to learn hard motions; bad videos should not be read as final PPO failure.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Train only after formula gates pass; for full runs use checkpoint/eval gates, not last checkpoint by default.

paper_contract: Paper VAE encoder is E(psi,e_anchor); decoder is D(z,[g,V_imu,theta,theta_dot,a_last]); modified ELBO beta=0.01 with DAgger.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: This is a direct mechanism for generic/averaged action outputs and leaning posture.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Do not use old resource-adjusted VAE for success videos. Use/retrain paper-contract VAE only on high-quality continuous teacher rollouts.

paper_contract: Formula-level split E(reference intent) and D(latent, proprioception), latent dim 32, hidden [2048,1024,512], lr 5e-4, beta 0.01.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: Even a corrected VAE will reproduce a weak/reset-heavy teacher and can still lean instead of lifting the leg.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Collect continuous, low-done-rate teacher rollout data before retraining this VAE for videos.

paper_contract: Paper diffusion models tau=[s,z,...] with hybrid yaw-centric state, individual state/latent denoising steps, Transformer denoiser.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: MLP over policy_obs+latent cannot be claimed as the paper state-latent diffusion and will not reliably produce leg-lift semantics.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Retire this path from success videos; keep it only as a debug baseline.

paper_contract: Transformer encoder, 512 dim, 8 heads, 6 layers, horizon 16, history 4, 20 denoising steps, batch 512, epochs 1000, weight decay 0.001, EMA.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: The architecture probes are useful, but the dataset and VAE encoder still differ from the paper's teacher-rollout pipeline.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Rewire diffusion training to consume paper-contract VAE latents from good teacher rollouts, then use receding-horizon closed-loop inference.

component: State projection, OU noise, symmetry augmentation
paper_contract: Use yaw-centric state, emphasis projection c=6, OU action noise sigma=0.1/theta=0.8, and sagittal symmetry augmentation.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: Without the VAE rollout error band and symmetry in the actual chain, diffusion may overfit/static-average.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Integrate these helpers into the teacher-rollout to VAE/diffusion pipeline, not only standalone audits.

paper_contract: Guidance must apply -grad_tau G(tau) inside reverse denoising for joystick, waypoint, SDF obstacle, inpainting.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: The visible guided videos were driven by latent interpolation/blending, not paper classifier guidance; they cannot prove task control.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Implement closed-loop receding-horizon guidance with differentiable task costs and record gradient norms/cost decrease.

paper_contract: Final video should execute policy/VAE/diffusion action -> theta_sp -> PD torque -> MuJoCo step, with no direct pose playback or root assist for success claims.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: Root assist and reference-anchor blending can make videos readable while hiding policy failure; pure learned variants still look poor.
required_fix_before_success_claim: For final success folder, disable root assist/blending, center camera only visually, and require continuous motion-time and low fall metrics.

paper_contract: A teacher used for VAE/diffusion must track the target motion continuously, with low done rate and meaningful leg-lift/body errors.
impact_on_current_bad_videos: This directly explains why teacher/VAE/diffusion did not learn single-leg posture and instead leaned.
required_fix_before_success_claim: Find or train a teacher that passes checkpoint eval before collecting VAE/diffusion data.
